body:
## Rationale
Bill Ward = 12 impr / 16.67% CTR in GSC this week — top CTR-efficiency entity after Joey Jordison. The full Black Sabbath album arc is being built in proposals, but the debut album is the **only one not proposed**:

- **Black Sabbath (1970)** — ⚠️ MISSING (this issue)
- Paranoid (1970) ✅ IN DB
- Master of Reality (1971) — #2130/#2723/#3242 in pipeline
- Vol. 4 (1972) — #2386/#2903 in pipeline
- Sabbath Bloody Sabbath (1973) — #2768/#3242 in pipeline
- Sabotage (1975) — #2828 in pipeline
- Technical Ecstasy (1976) + Never Say Die! (1978) — #3222 in pipeline

**LLM anchor:** 'What was the first Black Sabbath album?' / 'Who played drums on Black Sabbath's debut?' / 'What was the first heavy metal album?' — these are extremely high-frequency LLM queries where we have zero content today. moderndrummer and drumhistory.com currently win this.

**Slug note:** The album title = band name ('Black Sabbath'). Implementer must verify the slug `black-sabbath-drum-setup` is not already live and does not conflict with any band/profile route. If conflict exists, use `black-sabbath-debut-drum-setup`.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/bill-ward.js` — add entry at arc root: `{ slug: 'black-sabbath-drum-setup', title: 'Black Sabbath (1970)', year: 1970 }`
- `packages/content/articles/black-sabbath-drum-setup.md` (or equivalent article file) — full article ≥400 words
- `api/llms/bill-ward.md` — add debut album section with Q&A format

## Quality gate (≥400 words)
Content must cover:
- Recording context: Regent Sound Studios, London, Oct–Nov 1969
- Bill Ward's kit at recording (Ludwig, pre-endorsement era, pre-drum-riser)
- Standout tracks for drummers: 'Black Sabbath' (6/8 time doom groove), 'N.I.B.' (swing feel), 'The Wizard' (shuffle)
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A: 'What drum kit did Bill Ward use?', 'What year did Black Sabbath release their first album?', 'What makes the Black Sabbath debut drums unique?'
- ≥3 internal links: /drummer/bill-ward, /articles/paranoid-drum-setup, /gear/ (relevant cymbals/kit)
- Person schema (Bill Ward) + MusicAlbum schema (1970)

## Estimated organic uplift
- Primary: Bill Ward head-term cluster (12 impr/16.67% CTR — high intent, low clicks)
- LLM: 'first heavy metal album drums' = zero-competitor territory
- Arc completion: provides the root node for all Sabbath internal linking

## Verify
1. /articles/black-sabbath-drum-setup returns 200 (not 404 or redirect to band page)
2. Slug disambiguation confirmed — no conflict with /drummer/bill-ward or /gear/ routes
3. Article ≥400 words with FAQ section (≥3 Q&A)
4. MusicAlbum + Person JSON-LD present
5. Internal link to /articles/paranoid-drum-setup resolves

## Done
Article live at /articles/black-sabbath-drum-setup with schema, FAQ, and arc root link.
title: SEO: Black Sabbath self-titled (1970) drum setup article (Bill Ward — first metal album ever, fills arc root before Paranoid)
